quality-analysis-{repo}.md

overall_score: 7.8
scorecard:
Unit Tests: 8/10
Integration/E2E: 9/10
Build Integr.: 4/10
Image Testing: 6/10
Coverage: 8/10
CI/CD: 9/10
Agent Rules: 2/10
critical_gaps: [...]
quick_wins: [...]
---
